title: Director of Curriculum, Instruction & Assessment
notes: State-appointed CEO Dr. Henry Pettiegrew leads district under academic distress. Domzalski leads C&I; email not published on staff directory but district domain is east-cleveland.k12.oh.us (Buckner uses jbuckner@east-cleveland.k12.oh.us). District has preschool/early learning programs.

title: Director, Preschool Department
notes: Dayton Public Schools runs Rosa Parks Early Learning Center plus Preschool Promise partnership. Brevik leads district preschool dept. Email not public; DPS email format is [first initial][last]@dps.k12.oh.us. Associate Supt Lisa G. Minor also oversees ECE.

title: Supervisor, Early Childhood & Special Education
notes: Direct ECE supervisor role -- ideal persona. District participated in 2024 ODEW Literacy Academy presenting on explicit/systematic preschool literacy instruction.

title: Executive Director of Curriculum & Instruction
notes: Largest district in Butler County (~15K students). Operates 6 early childhood (PK-2) schools including Liberty Early Childhood. Brown appointed April 2024. Megan Ginther and Lara House serve as assistant directors K-6 curriculum.

title: Assistant Superintendent of Curriculum & Instruction
notes: Appointed April 2022, contract renewed 2024-2027. District uses Frog Street Preschool curriculum. Operates Hilliard Preschool at 2874 Alton Darby Creek Dr. Email not public; district uses @hboe.org for some staff and hilliardschools.org for others.

title: Deputy Superintendent
notes: Mason Early Childhood Center (MECC) serves PreK-2. Brennan oversees Teaching & Learning. Email inferred from confirmed Mason format [lastname][first initial]@masonohioschools.com (e.g., fischleym, cooperj). Michelle Fischley (fischleym@masonohioschools.com) is preschool contact.

Small district; preschool maintains 5-Star Step Up to Quality rating since inception. District coordinates New Lebanon Preschool Consortium with local providers. No dedicated ECE director identified in public-facing staff info. Superintendent is likely best target -- name not confirmed in public search.

title: Senior Director of Curriculum
notes: Hensley oversees K-12 curriculum. Tracy Neeley (tneeley@middletowncityschools.com) is K-5 Curriculum Coordinator -- a strong secondary ECE contact.

title: PK-5 Curriculum Coordinator
notes: Operates Early Learning Village. Urbic is direct PK-5 owner. Director of Curriculum & Instruction is Brian Mamich (bmamich@euclidschools.org, 216-797-2986). Preschool Coordinator Sara Lindberg (slindberg@euclidschools.org).

title: Preschool Supervisor (Helping Hands Preschool)
notes: Mix joined 2022, prior experience at Trumbull County ESC. Operates Helping Hands Preschool. District Department of Instruction handles K-12 curriculum; Mix is direct ECE owner. Email not surfaced in public search.

title: Superintendent
notes: Smaller rural district. No dedicated ECE director found. Belville is best district-level contact. Email format c***@fairfieldunion.org per ZoomInfo. Note: domain is fairfieldunion.org (not the ESC -- FCESC is faircoesc.org which we excluded).

title: Director of Curriculum and Instruction
notes: District operates Studebaker Preschool. Email format firstname.lastname@myhhcs.org confirmed across multiple staff. Doll promoted from Secondary Curriculum Supervisor.

title: Chief Academic Officer
notes: Mansfield runs Pre-K program at Sherman Elementary (Pre-K Coordinator Jamie Spotts, 419-525-6400 x1441). Rizzo title moved from Director of Curriculum to CAO. Email inferred from pattern [last][first initial]@mansfieldschools.org -- confirmed via RocketReach masking r***@mansfieldschools.org.

title: Executive Director of Elementary Curriculum & Instruction
notes: District uses Creative Curriculum (Teaching Strategies) in preschool, aligned to Ohio Early Learning Standards. Preschool led by Associate Director Alisha Pardon. Bill Ohle is direct elementary/PK-5 curriculum owner. Email format b***@lorainschools.org per ZoomInfo masking.

title: Assistant Superintendent (Curriculum & Instruction)
notes: Letterhos oversees curriculum, instruction, assessment, elementary and secondary programming. Superintendent is Lucas Messer. Email not publicly listed on staff page.

Small rural district (~1,256 students). Preschool runs through Greene County ESC at Greeneview Elementary using Creative Curriculum. Prior Supt Isaac Seevers left for Lebanon City in 2021. Joe Parish previously held the role. Current supt name not surfaced in public search.

title: Superintendent
notes: Smaller district (~2,154 students PK-12). No dedicated ECE director identified. Howard is best district contact. Scott Lowe is Director of Special Services. Email not published publicly.

title: Director of Title I & Federal Programs and Elementary Curriculum
notes: Strong ECE persona match -- Stallard owns Title I + elementary curriculum. District preschools maintain 5-Star Step Up to Quality. Superintendent: Laura Tompkins. District uses 'Email Me' redirect on Administration page rather than publishing emails. Lisa Shannon is Early Childhood Intervention Specialist.

title: Director of Elementary Education
notes: Assistant Supt Angie Adrean oversees Academics (9-year tenure). Messenheimer is direct elementary lead. District uses @wscloud.org domain for staff email (not the .k12.oh.us website domain).

title: Director of Instruction and Achievement
notes: ~6,300 students PK-12. Full-day kindergarten and half-day Pre-K for students with special needs and peer models. Superintendent: Jamie Grube. Email not surfaced in public search.

title: Curriculum Director
notes: Superintendent Jonathan Davis, Asst Supt Kyle Uhrig. District office at 388 Clark Drive. Email not publicly published in search results.

title: Director of Instruction
notes: Barrell confirmed via LinkedIn as Director of Curriculum. Superintendent: Monte Bainter. District operates loganhocking.school as new domain alongside .k12.oh.us. Staff emails use @lhsd.k12.oh.us pattern.

title: Superintendent
notes: Small district (3 buildings). McCorkle assumed role Aug 2025 after Dr. James Payne resigned. No dedicated ECE/curriculum director identified -- Superintendent is best contact. Email not publicly published.

title: Superintendent
notes: Small rural district in Noble County (~720 students). Recently rejoined Ohio Valley ESC. No dedicated ECE director; Superintendent is best contact.

title: Director of Teaching and Learning
notes: Goetz promoted from Milford Junior High Principal; named Ohio Middle School Principal of the Year by OASSA. EdD in Educational Leadership from Xavier (2025). District uses district-website message form rather than published emails.

title: Superintendent
notes: Small rural Darke County district. STRONG buying signal: District opened Junior Jet Academy preschool Aug 2023 for ages 3-5 (Karina Robison directs). New build / new program -- ideal outreach timing. Email domain @fmlsd.org not @franklin-monroe.k12.oh.us.

title: Director of Curriculum
notes: Rossford Preschool Program has Gold (former 5-Star) Step Up to Quality rating. Superintendent: Dan Creps (since 2013). District broke ground on $70M new schools project. Email format m***@rossfordschools.org per ZoomInfo masking.

title: Superintendent and CEO
notes: Small Cincinnati district known for unique multi-age teaching structure (Fox19 coverage Dec 2023). Banks in role since ~2020. Lester Tacy is Director. Email format l***@finneytown.org per ZoomInfo. No dedicated ECE director.

title: Superintendent
notes: Small district. Simmons started July 1, 2024 -- prior role was Director of Curriculum & Instruction at Elida Schools (strong ECE/curriculum background). District received Ohio Momentum Award and 4.5-Star state report card rating. Email not publicly listed.

title: Director of Elementary Education
notes: Operates Alliance Early Learning School (AELS). Cory Muller principal of AELS. Balderson confirmed via district Facebook post w/ Supt Rob Gress. Superintendent Rob Gress's email is g***@alliancecityschools.org per ZoomInfo masking.

title: Assistant Superintendent
notes: AW Early Childhood Center is 5-Star Step Up to Quality (SUTQ). John Maynard was previous preschool director. Preschool is licensed by ODE. Herman handles curriculum, professional development, HR. Email not publicly published; district domain anthonywayneschools.org.

title: Superintendent
notes: Small rural Hancock County district. New school building groundbreaking 2024. Email uses Northwest Ohio Area Computer Services Cooperative (NOACSC) domain -- standard for small NW Ohio districts (not ESC). No dedicated ECE director.

title: Director of Curriculum and Instruction
notes: Buying signal: Barberton received $1.49M literacy grant. Mike Andric serves as Assistant Director of Curriculum. Habegger holds PhD. Phone ext 13129. Email not publicly listed; district uses behind-login staff directory.

title: Director of Curriculum & Instruction (and Human Resources)
notes: Operates Fairmount Early Childhood Center (PreK). District has 3x US Dept of Ed Blue Ribbon awards and ODEW 'Excellent' rating. Small affluent suburban district (~1,500 students).

title: Executive Director of Instructional Services
notes: Henry retirement effective Dec 31 2024, but rehired by board for '24-'25 and '25-'26 school years. Email format h***@bellefontaine.k12.oh.us per ZoomInfo (note: district uses both bcs-k12.org and bellefontaine.k12.oh.us).

title: Superintendent
notes: Small rural Fairfield County district. Parker oversees groundbreaking on new school building. Elementary Principal Melissa Drury; HS Principal Craig S. Heath EdD. No dedicated ECE director. Email format not publicly published.

title: Assistant Superintendent of Instruction
notes: Purdon explicitly oversees Early Learning and Development alongside ELA, math, science, social studies, PE, fine arts, world languages. Strong ECE persona match. Superintendent: Randy Dunlap (dunlapr@blan.org). Domain is @blan.org, not @blanschools.org.

title: Director of Instruction
notes: District operates Early Childhood Learning Center (ECLC). Cardillo leads Curriculum Office which includes literacy coach, math coach, gifted coach. Email domain @boardmanschools.org (not the k12.oh.us website domain). Phone ext 63413.

title: Superintendent
notes: Very small district (~709 students) across Adams and Highland counties. Only 3 district administrators total. No dedicated ECE director -- Superintendent is best contact. Email format not publicly published.

title: Superintendent
notes: Small Carroll County district (Malvern). Hawk assumed Superintendent role Aug 1, 2025 after Mark Scott left for Minerva Local. Was previously Malvern Elementary Principal for 6 years. Strong leadership transition signal. Buying signal: district opened Malvern Community Learning and Wellness Center (with Aultman Health partnership).
